original_image_tags: Greenish-tinted paper document. At the top, there are two punch holes. A white rectangular patch covers a section at the top right. On the left side, there is a vertical distribution list with names:

elements.description: Typed letter dated April 11, 1950, addressed to Miss Laura McClaskey regarding an enclosed communication from April 4, 1950. The page contains typed body text and standard memorandum structure.

judge.reason: Description A claims specific visual content (greenish paper, punch holes, white patch, vertical distribution list) that is completely absent from Description B, which describes only a typed memorandum.
